examples: The noise of bombs and guns was incessant.
Incessant rain made conditions almost intolerable.
Any one event can incite a flurry of attention, with incessant reiteration of the original allegations.
He is a compulsive talker, his incessant conversational stream tracking the course of his volatile emotions.
But to Singapore's credit, its incessant fiddling with various levies seeks to incentivize work and entrepreneurism.
